iotanalytics.datastore.DatastoreName.Description: The name of the data store.

iotanalytics.datastore.DatastorePartitio.Description: Information about the partition dimensions in a data store.

iotanalytics.datastore.DatastoreStorage.Description: Where data store data is stored.

iotanalytics.datastore.FileFormatConfigu.Description: Contains the configuration information of file formats. AWS IoT Analytics data stores support JSON and [Parquet](https://parquet.apache.org/).  The default file format is JSON. You can specify only one format.  You can't change the file format after you create the data store.

iotanalytics.datastore.RetentionPeriod.Description: How long, in days, message data is kept for the data store. When `customerManagedS3` storage is selected, this parameter is ignored.

iotanalytics.datastore.Tags.Description: Metadata which can be used to manage the data store.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
